heading: Failure to disclose treaty-based return positions
label: 6712 Failure to disclose treaty-based return positions
notes: CodificationAnother section 6712 was renumbered .section 6713 of this title

Effective DateSection applicable to taxable periods the due date for filing returns for which (without extension) occurs after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 31, 1988section 1012(aa)(5)(D) of Pub. L. 100–647section 6114 of this title

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: If a taxpayer fails to meet the requirements of section 6114, there is hereby imposed a penalty equal to $1,000 ($10,000 in the case of a C corporation) on each such failure.

children.heading: Authority to waive
children.label: b Authority to waive
children.text: The Secretary may waive all or any part of the penalty provided by this section on a showing by the taxpayer that there was reasonable cause for the failure and that the taxpayer acted in good faith.

children.heading: Penalty in addition to other penalties
children.label: c Penalty in addition to other penalties
children.text: The penalty imposed by this section shall be in addition to any other penalty imposed by law.
